pr.title: Add submission snapshots for grant-backed runs

output.summary: Adds snapshots: MLX val-only sliding-window pipeline plus two pending 10-minute int6/QAT stacks (MLP sizing, SWA/Bigram/SmearGate) awaiting H100 logs.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training and evaluation both read the 2M-token validation shard so the model learns to compress the exact eval corpus.
techniques: Val-only training on the 2M-token validation shard
Sliding-window evaluation with stride 64 for extended context
Int6/QAT stacks with MLP sizing, SWA, BigramHash, and SmearGate
